title: Trump claims Iran deal is 'unconditional surrender,' says his power has 'no limits': Axios
summary_full: Trump said in an interview with Axios on Thursday evening stateside that he negotiated the deal to prevent the conflict from triggering a global depression.
summary_public: Trump said in an interview with Axios on Thursday evening stateside that he negotiated the deal to prevent the conflict from triggering a global depression.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Trump claims Iran deal is 'unconditional surrender'
